scope_note: QA Obstruction Efficiency family [114]: family_extension of QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 [107]. Certifies that obstruction-aware pruning ([113]) reduces measurable search cost. For forbidden targets (v_p=1), aware planner expands 0 nodes vs naive N>0: saved_nodes=N, pruning_ratio=1.0. For valid targets, no false pruning occurs. Validator recomputes all efficiency metrics from raw traces. Completes the theory→efficiency chain: [111] impossible → [112] unreachable → [113] pruned → [114] cheaper.
